title: Diana's Digital Twin
shortDescription: An AI-powered conversational agent trained on Diana Ismail's professional background, projects, and skills. Available on web and Telegram. Built with FastAPI, OpenAI, and Redis.
detailedDescription: Engage in natural conversations with my digital twin, which speaks in my voice to share grounded insights from my 20+ years in project leadership, creative tech, and AI innovation. It draws from tiered context like my resume and project notes for accurate, personalized responses without hallucinations. Seamlessly switch between the glassmorphic web chat widget and Telegram bot, with persistent memory via Redis ensuring your conversation history follows you. Built with FastAPI, OpenAI GPT, and modular design for easy extension to new interfaces.
keyLearnings: Tiered context injection (always-on vs on-demand keyword triggers) reduced token usage by ~57% vs injecting everything.

title: CV/JD Matcher & Application Tool
shortDescription: An AI tool that scores a CV against a job description,identifies gaps, and generates tailored suggestions. Includes job pipeline tracking and interview prep. Built with Next.js, OpenAI, and PostgreSQL.
detailedDescription: “Upload your CV and a job description into Reso, and instantly receive a match score, strengths, gaps, and personalized recommendations—it feels intuitive and actionable from the first use. Key capabilities include conversational analysis powered by AI, tailored CV generation, interview prep packs with custom questions, and a full job tracker for managing applications, logging sessions with AI note summaries, and viewing dashboard insights. Built with Next.js and OpenAI APIs for seamless performance.
keyLearnings: The `sessionStorage` navigation pattern (passing job UUIDs via `sessionStorage` rather than URL params) was a deliberate privacy and UX decision that required careful `SSR` guard handling in Next.js.

title: AI Chat Scheduler
shortDescription: A conversational AI assistant that helps event attendees discover sessions and build conflict-free personal schedules for multi-day events. Built with the Vercel AI SDK and OpenAI.
detailedDescription: Attendees chat naturally with the AI event assistant to explore sessions, get smart recommendations, and generate itineraries that avoid clashes across multi-day events. Organizers benefit from a tool that personalizes the experience without complex forms. Built as a conversational interface using Vercel AI SDK and OpenAI GPT-5.1, it leverages Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript 5, and Tailwind CSS 4 for a smooth, responsive demo.
keyLearnings: Using special AI-emitted markers (`[GENERATE_SCHEDULE]`, `schedule_download` JSON blocks) to trigger client-side behaviours from within streamed AI responses — a clean way to bridge LLM output and UI state.

title: GEO Audit
shortDescription: A tool that tests any webpage's visibility to AI search engines — Perplexity, Gemini, ChatGPT. Returns a scored report with specific, actionable improvements. Built with React 19, Express.js, Gemini, and OpenAI.
detailedDescription: GEO Audit analyzes your website content against 2026 AI search standards, delivering a clear score and prioritized recommendations to boost citation chances. Start with a free basic scan covering fact density, entity salience, and extractability, or unlock advanced insights including competitor gaps and platform-specific fits for deeper optimization. The conversational flow feels intuitive: enter a URL, watch the progress, and receive polished reports with charts and PDF export. Built with React 19 frontend on Vite, Express backend powered by Gemini and OpenAI APIs, PostgreSQL for data persistence, and deployed on Railway.
keyLearnings: Building a credible two-tier (free vs paid) SaaS product with a completely decoupled frontend/backend architecture — `VITE_*` env vars are baked into the browser bundle at build time, so secrets must never touch the frontend.
